project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis system with FastAPI dashboard
verification_instructions: Run pytest tests/test_report.py to verify report changes. Run python -m dashboard.app to verify dashboard starts.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Python 3.11 available via pyenv.
contribution_requirements: Follow patterns in existing code. All new features must have tests.
key_patterns: report.py uses generate_report() function with THEME_GROUPS dict for agent categorization. Dashboard templates extend base.html and use Jinja2. API routes in dashboard/app.py. CLI in src/augur/cli.py.
directory_structure: src/augur/ - core Python package; dashboard/ - FastAPI web UI; tests/ - pytest tests; cases/analysis-reports/ - reference report examples; personas/ - YAML custom personas
